jsonLd.title: Shiprocket is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shiprocket. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
